---
title: "Summary statistics"
teaching: 30
exercises: 10
questions:
- "FIXME"
objectives:
- "FIXME"
keypoints:
- "FIXME"
source: Rmd
---


```{r, include=FALSE}
source("../bin/chunk-options.R")
knitr_fig_path("02-")
```

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

Deskreptiv statistik. Summariser og giver et første indtryk af vores data.

Hvor er vores data

mean, median, mode, interquartile mean

Spredning

SD, varians, range, inter quartile range, absolute deviation, mean absolute difference, distance standard deviation

shape
Skewness, kurtoses
Er mine data faktisk normalfordelte?

afhængighed mellem parrede variable.
Pearson product-moment correlation coefficient


{% include links.md %}
